gt_sql: SELECT t3.player_name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id INNER JOIN Player AS t3 ON t2.home_player_1 = t3.player_api_id WHERE t1.name = 'Belgium'
